# Binary Check

```sql
USE datawarehouse
GO

drop table #t1
SELECT OB.WORKORDER_TYPE
	, OB.WORKORDER_BASE_ID
	, OB.WORKORDER_LOT_ID
	, OB.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID
	, OB.WORKORDER_SUB_ID
	, OB.SEQUENCE_NO
	, CAST(CAST(OB.BITS AS VARBINARY(MAX)) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS [BEFORE_OB]
	, OB.BITS AS [OB_BINARY]
	, OB.BITS_LENGTH AS [OB_BITLEN] 
INTO #T1
FROM OPERATION O
INNER JOIN OPERATION_BINARY OB
	ON O.WORKORDER_TYPE = OB.WORKORDER_TYPE
	AND O.WORKORDER_BASE_ID = OB.WORKORDER_BASE_ID
	AND O.WORKORDER_LOT_ID = OB.WORKORDER_LOT_ID
	AND O.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID = OB.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID
	AND O.WORKORDER_SUB_ID = OB.WORKORDER_SUB_ID
	AND O.SEQUENCE_NO = OB.SEQUENCE_NO
WHERE OB.WORKORDER_TYPE = 'M'
AND OB.WORKORDER_BASE_ID IN ('112W2360-45', '112W2361-42', '112W2361-46', '112W2810-11', '112W2810-12', '112W2810-16', '112W5041-307', '112W5041-308', '112W5041-701', '112W5108-71', '112W7127-29', --AND CAST(CAST(OB.BITS AS VARBINARY(MAX)) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) LIKE '%INDICATE MASKANT USED:  PLUGS / TAPE / LIQUID%'

SELECT * FROM #T1

/*


BEGIN TRANSACTION;
UPDATE OB
SET OB.BITS = T.[OB_BINARY]
	, OB.BITS_LENGTH = T.[OB_BITLEN] 
FROM [sql-lab-1].LIVE.DBO.OPERATION_BINARY OB
INNER JOIN #t1 T
	ON OB.WORKORDER_TYPE = T.WORKORDER_TYPE
	AND OB.WORKORDER_BASE_ID = T.WORKORDER_BASE_ID
	AND OB.WORKORDER_LOT_ID	= T.WORKORDER_LOT_ID
	AND OB.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID = T.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID
	AND OB.WORKORDER_SUB_ID = T.WORKORDER_SUB_ID
	AND OB.SEQUENCE_NO = T.SEQUENCE_NO
--> COMMIT TRANSACTION;
--> ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
*/
```
